Add Repository
In the configured repository, project members can view assets, execute tests, and edit datasets.
Git URL

For example, you can enter the URLs in the following format:

Single repository:
HTTPS URL: https://github.com/user/repo.git
SSH URL: git@github.com:user/repo.git or ssh://git@host:port/user/repo.git
Multiple repositories:
https://github.com
Authorization policy:Authorization policy on the Git server has no effect on the configured repository.
Cancel
Add

children.class: p-button-transparent p-button-icon-only member-search-button p-button p-component p-button-icon-only

children.content:
Add Repository
In the configured repository, project members can view assets, execute tests, and edit datasets.
Git URL

For example, you can enter the URLs in the following format:

Single repository:
HTTPS URL: https://github.com/user/repo.git
SSH URL: git@github.com:user/repo.git or ssh://git@host:port/user/repo.git
Multiple repositories:
https://github.com
Authorization policy:Authorization policy on the Git server has no effect on the configured repository.
Cancel
Add

children.class: otc-addrepo-dialog p-dialog p-component p-dialog-default p-ripple-disabled p-dialog-enter-done
